text: Really interesting course and material and a very good instructor . This would be a 5 stars course if it wasn ' t for the final project . During lessons some concepts of statistics were taken as known ( which is okay ) . However the final project required to utilize a combination of all new learned material on a whole different level of difficulty compared to the preceding quizzes . I did not expect that jump in difficulty and enjoyed the course a lot but the final project just was a struggle .
